problem_statement: Given the root of a Binary Tree, return the height of the tree. The height of the tree is equal to the number of nodes on the longest path from root to a leaf.

examples.explanation: In the above example, the height of the binary tree is along the longest path from the root node 1 -> 5 -> 4 -> 5.
